testcase.name: test_11_create_agency_with_full_address

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'Agency Complex, Block A'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_address_features.py:272: in test_11_create_agency_with_full_address assert data["address_line_1"] == "Agency Complex, Block A" E AssertionError: assert None == 'Agency Complex, Block A'

testcase.name: test_14_create_order_for_doctor
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_address_features.py:361: in test_14_create_order_for_doctor assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to create order: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create order: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","customer_name"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"doctor_id":"85d4c77d-469a-4b88-a6ba-a34c572736a2","items":[{"item_id":"5f2ded6c-b7ed-4b82-8878-d1e22d004cc9","quantity":5}],"notes":"Test order for auto-fill verification"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","customer_phone"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"doctor_id":"85d4c77d-469a-4b88-a6ba-a34c572736a2","items":[{"item_id":"5f2ded6c-b7ed-4b82-8878-d1e22d004cc9","quantity":5}],"notes":"Test order for auto-fill verification"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","items",0,"item_code"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"item_id":"5f2ded6c-b7ed-4b82-8878-d1e22d004cc9","quantity":5},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","items",0,"item_name"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"item_id":"5f2ded6c-b7ed-4b82-8878-d1e22d004cc9","quantity":5},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","items",0,"quantity"],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":5,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/string_type"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","items",0,"mrp"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"item_id":"5f2ded6c-b7ed-4b82-8878-d1e22d004cc9","quantity":5},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","items",0,"rate"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"item_id":"5f2ded6c-b7ed-4b82-8878-d1e22d004cc9","quantity":5},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
